typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: `SwitcherCrossFlowTests` dashboard rendered-indicator checks still use renderability-only assertions (`XCTAssertNotNil`) instead of concrete rendered seams (`testActiveProfileDisplayName`/accessibility labels).
`SwitcherCrossFlowTests` popover rendered-indicator checks still use renderability-only assertions (`XCTAssertNotNil`) rather than explicit rendered label/accessibility assertions.
Cross-surface switch synchronization proof remains store-driven (`localStore.setActiveProfile`) instead of UI callback/action paths (`testTriggerSelectAndSwitch` / `testTriggerSwitchViaUIAction`).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Codify VAL-CROSS evidence bars: rendered-indicator claims must assert concrete rendered labels/accessibility values, and switch/launch claims must be proven via UI callback paths and launch invocation traces (not store mutation).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 9 review still finds renderability-only indicator checks and direct store mutation in `SwitcherCrossFlowTests` for `integration-hardening-finalize-crossflow-rendered-ui-launch-trace-evidence`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require `followedProcedure=true` only when handoff includes concrete manual UI sanity-check evidence, otherwise require explicit deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Rerun review shows step-7 manual-check requirements continue to be marked followed without interactive evidence in handoffs.

rejectedObservations.observation: Recurring confusion around `@State`-dependent test seams outside hosted render context should be added to shared guidance immediately.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous single-feature signal; needs broader cross-feature evidence before codifying shared guidance.
